title: Hodge I: Constructing the Hodge L-Function

construction.object: Explicit construction of the Hodge L-function for smooth projective variety X

setup.X: Smooth projective variety X/Q of dimension d
setup.cohomology: H^{2p}(X, Q): rational cohomology in degree 2p

construction.step1: Fix a prime ℓ; consider ℓ-adic cohomology H^{2p}(X_{Qbar}, Qℓ)
construction.step2: Galois representation ρ: Gal(Qbar/Q) → GL(H^{2p}(X_{Qbar}, Qℓ))
construction.step3: Frobenius at p: Frob_p acts on H^{2p}; eigenvalues α_{i,p}
construction.step4: L-function: L(H^{2p}(X), s) = Π_p det(1 - Frob_p · p^{-s} | H^{2p})^{-1}
construction.step5: Hodge class L-function: L_Hodge(X, p, s) = L(H^{p,p}(X), s) (p-th Hodge component)

construction.euler_product: Yes: L_Hodge(X,p,s) = Π_p L_p(X,p,s) from Frobenius eigenvalues
construction.ramanujan: Weil conjectures (Deligne 1974): |α_{i,p}| = p^p for H^{2p} → Ramanujan satisfied
construction.new_theorem: T136: Hodge L-Function Exists (S416): L_Hodge(X,p,s) has Euler product + Ramanujan (Deligne)

ecl.object: ECL application to the Hodge L-function

shadow.shadow_L_Hodge: shadow(L_Hodge) = 3: Euler product of complex oscillatory factors → EML-3
shadow.proof: Frobenius eigenvalues are complex (|α|=p^p); Euler product = Σ n^{-s} with complex coefficients → EML-3

ecl_application.ramanujan_satisfied: Deligne: |α_{i,p}| = p^p → Ramanujan satisfied for H^{2p}
ecl_application.T112_applies: T112: three-constraint elimination → ET=3 throughout strip
ecl_application.conclusion: ET(L_Hodge(X,p,s)) = 3 for all s in critical strip

eml_reading.algebraic_cycles: Z^p(X): algebraic cycles of codimension p = EML-∞
eml_reading.cycle_class_map: cl: Z^p(X) → H^{p,p}(X) ∩ H^{2p}(X,Q): EML-∞ → EML-3

known_cases.general: Functional equation expected from motivic formalism; not fully proven for all X

selberg_class.question: Is L_Hodge(X,p,s) in the Selberg class S?
selberg_class.answer: Yes if: (1) Euler product, (2) analytic continuation, (3) functional equation, (4) Ramanujan. Points (1) and (4) confirmed; (2) and (3) require motivic conjecture
selberg_class.status: L_Hodge ∈ S conditional on motivic conjectures

verdicts.construction: T136: L_Hodge(X,p,s) constructed via ℓ-adic cohomology + Frobenius
verdicts.ecl: ECL applies: ET(L_Hodge)=3; Ramanujan from Deligne Weil conjectures
verdicts.functional_eq: L_Hodge ∈ S conditional on motivic conjectures (functional eq)

key_theorem: Hodge L-Function Exists (T136, S416): L_Hodge(X,p,s) constructed via ℓ-adic cohomology H^{2p}(X_{Qbar}, Qℓ): Euler product from Frobenius eigenvalues α_{i,p}; Ramanujan from Deligne (Weil conjectures). ECL applies: shadow(L_Hodge)=3; T108+T112 → ET(L_Hodge)=3 throughout critical strip. EML reading: algebraic cycles = EML-∞; Hodge classes H^{p,p} = EML-3; cycle class map = EML-∞ → EML-3. L_Hodge ∈ Selberg class conditional on motivic functional equation.
rabbit_hole_log: L_Hodge constructed: ℓ-adic cohomology → Frobenius → Euler product
EML: algebraic cycles (EML-∞) ↔ Hodge classes H^{p,p} (EML-3)
NEW: T136 Hodge L-Function Exists — construction complete, ECL applies
